robot_capabilities.patrol_robot: Patrol Robot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.aerial_surveillance_drone: Aerial Surveillance Drone autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.emergency_response_bot: Emergency Response Bot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.guide_robot: Guide Robot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.barricade_assistant_robot: Barricade Assistant Robot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.

robot_morphology.patrol_robot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.aerial_surveillance_drone: Type: Aerial Drone, Radius: 0.25 m, Payload: 3 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional
robot_morphology.emergency_response_bot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.guide_robot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.barricade_assistant_robot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic

task_specific_rules: Emergency events override ongoing low-priority tasks.
Robots should coordinate dynamically for multi-agent task execution.
Safety-critical alerts must interrupt current workflows.
task_replanning_rules: Robots must replan routes when paths become blocked.
Nearest available robot should respond to emergency events.
Idle robots can assist overloaded robots during critical operations.
